title: 코스피지수, 2,700선 돌파
summary: 한국 주식시장(KOSPI)이 외국인 매수 호재로 사상 최고치를 갱신했습니다.
content: The KOSPI index broke the 2,700-point mark for the first time. Foreign investors led the buying spree with increased confidence. Technology stocks showed the strongest performance. Manufacturing sectors also saw significant gains. Market analysts attribute the rally to economic recovery signs. Domestic investors joined the upward trend. Trading volume reached record levels. IPO market is experiencing renewed activity. Financial regulators are monitoring for potential overheating. Corporate earnings expectations remain positive for the quarter. The rally reflects growing investor sentiment in Korean markets.
